author: Toby Chen
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. A multi-feature editing toolbox for Obsidian — rich image arrangement, block drag and drop, slash commands, and more

manifest.author: Toby Chen
manifest.description: A multi-feature editing toolbox with rich image arrangement, block drag and drop, slash commands, and more.
manifest.name: Better Edit

name: Better Edit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Better Edit 0.1.2

This patch release fixes a published-install styling regression where Obsidian or theme button styles could leak into Better Edit custom toolbar and picker buttons.

### Changes
- Keeps toolbar buttons borderless without reintroducing `!important`.
- Hardens custom plugin button styling across image, text link, symbol, and settings controls.
- Updates release metadata to 0.1.2 with minimum app version 1.12.3.

### Verification
- npm run check
releases.name: Better Edit 0.1.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Better Edit 0.1.1

This patch release focuses on the review issues found after 0.1.0.

### Changes
- Keeps the plugin minimum app version at 1.12.3 while avoiding newer settings APIs.
- Fixes the settings type collision that release scanning reported as a 1.13.0 API use.
- Removes the reported CSS !important and :has() patterns from source and generated CSS.
- Rebuilds manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css from the corrected release metadata.

### Verification
- npm run check
- Release workflow with artifact attestations
releases.name: Better Edit 0.1.1
